title: Clutter: Archeology Plus
description: A mod that aims to add more content to the Archeology feature introduced in 1.20.
body:
![Bisect Banner](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/EmilsGithub/Clutter-Mod-Repository/refs/heads/main/Images/Bisect%20Banner.png)
**Clutter** is partnered with **Bisect Hosting** so if you want to start a new server, make sure to give them a try, use the code: [Clutter](https://bisecthosting.com/Clutter) to get **25% off!**

Archeology Plus is a small 1.20 mod that aims to add to the new Archeology feature, mostly by adding sherds(+corresponding decorative pots of course) and other similar items to the new digsites.

![Decorative Pots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xJ3jwmS6/images/910a523abdd81e551fe78efc46d87889d9d2215c.png "Decorative Pots")
